title: AIVendorReview
description: Schema for conducting risk reviews on AI tools and external vendors.

vendor.description: The name of the vendor providing the AI tool or service.

tool.description: The name of the specific tool, model, or API.

useCase.description: The specific internal or external business use case.

businessOwner.description: The internal team lead or department head sponsoring the tool.

dataEntered.description: Categories of data submitted to the tool (e.g. source code, customer support transcripts, employee notes).

outputUse.description: Where and how the outputs generated by the AI tool will be used.

retentionPosition.description: The vendor's data retention duration policy (e.g. zero data retention, 30 days).

trainingOnCustomerData.description: Whether the vendor uses submitted data/inputs to train their public or base models.

subprocessors.description: Any underlying sub-processors or hosting partners used by this AI tool.

securityMaterial.description: Security documents reviewed (e.g. SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, Pen Test Reports).

approvedUse.description: Whether the tool is officially approved for internal or production use.

prohibitedUse.description: Explicitly prohibited use cases or data types (e.g., do not input personal data or core source code).

conditions.description: Conditions under which the tool may be used (e.g. opt-out of model training, SSO configuration).
